Menu.Name: DND Animal Island UI
Menu.Label: Configure
Menu.Hint: Configure the Animal Island theme, compatibility fixes, chat stickers, player sidebar visibility, and per-client personal preferences (cursor, effects, asset intensity).

Config.Title: DND Animal Island UI Settings
Config.PersonalHint: These options are stored in your own browser. Every player can set them independently.
Config.StickersHint: Add world-shared custom stickers. Rows with an empty command or missing image are ignored on save.

EnableTheme.Name: Enable Theme
EnableTheme.Hint: Enable the global DND Animal Island UI theme.

CompatMode.Name: Compatibility Mode
CompatMode.Hint: Keep the base theme look but temporarily disable high-risk decorative layers: button effects, folder softening, journal overrides, and DnD5e animal backgrounds.

EnableCursor.Name: Animal Island Cursor
EnableCursor.Hint: Use the bundled game-style pointer (text fields and window resize handles keep system cursors).

EnableButtonPressFx.Name: Button Press Effects
EnableButtonPressFx.Hint: Play a small bounce and leaf sparkle when clicking buttons.

EnableStickers.Name: Chat Animal Stickers
EnableStickers.Hint: Add an animal sticker button to the chat input bar for sending bundled SVG stickers.

AssetIntensity.Name: Asset Intensity
AssetIntensity.Hint: Control how present background textures and decorative assets are.

EnableFolderSoftening.Name: Soften Sidebar Folder Colors
EnableFolderSoftening.Hint: Tone down custom Foundry folder colors so they do not clash with the Animal Island palette.

EnableJournalReadability.Name: Journal Readability Fixes
EnableJournalReadability.Hint: Force journal pages to keep a light paper background with high-contrast text.

EnableDnd5eSheetSafety.Name: DnD5e Sheet Compatibility Guard
EnableDnd5eSheetSafety.Hint: Keep native system layout and restrict the theme to shells and readability.

EnableDnd5eAnimalBackground.Name: DnD5e Animal Sheet Background
EnableDnd5eAnimalBackground.Hint: Give actor/NPC/item sheets a soft Animal Island paper background.

EnableSidebarVisibility.Name: Enable Player Sidebar Control
EnableSidebarVisibility.Hint: Only affects non-GM players. GMs are never subject to hiding rules.

Notify.UnknownSticker: No animal sticker found for: {query}. Available: {options}
Notify.KeepOneTab: At least one sidebar tab must stay visible to players. One tab was kept automatically.
